Everything you need.

Complete control over your financial picture.

Realtime Dashboard

Asset values updated every second with zero latency.

Multi-Asset

Track crypto, forex, gold, and Vietnamese stocks—all in one unified portfolio.

P/L Tracking

Realtime profit & loss calculations.

AI Portfolio Advisor

Intelligent recommendations to optimize your portfolio allocation based on market conditions and risk profile.

Asset News Updates

Stay informed with real-time news and market insights for all your tracked assets.

Realtime Access

Global Multi-Asset Market

Institutional-grade real-time pricing across crypto, precious metals, and energy commodities.
